Trait.name: Albino
Trait.label: Albino
Trait.description: Born with a genetic lack of pigmentation, resulting in pale skin, white hair, and heightened sensitivity to sunlight.

Trait.name: Dwarfism
Trait.label: Dwarfism
Trait.description: Inherited condition resulting in significantly shorter stature than average.

Trait.name: Gigantism
Trait.label: Gigantism
Trait.description: Inherited condition resulting in unusually large stature and bone structure.

Trait.name: Hemophiliac
Trait.label: Hemophiliac
Trait.description: Inherited blood disorder that prevents wounds from clotting properly, making injuries far more dangerous.

Trait.name: Inbred
Trait.label: Inbred
Trait.description: Descended from close relatives, resulting in weakened health and reduced mental acuity.

Trait.name: Fecund
Trait.label: Fecund
Trait.description: Inherited trait that greatly increases fertility and the likelihood of conceiving children.

Trait.name: Infertile
Trait.label: Infertile
Trait.description: Inherited condition that makes conceiving children difficult or impossible.

Trait.name: Colorblind
Trait.label: Colorblind
Trait.description: Inherited condition that makes it difficult to distinguish between certain colors.

Trait.name: Ginger
Trait.label: Ginger
Trait.description: Carries the hereditary trait for red hair and fair, freckled skin.

Trait.name: Congenital Baldness
Trait.label: Congenital Baldness
Trait.description: Inherited predisposition to lose hair early in life.

Trait.name: Robust Constitution
Trait.label: Robust Constitution
Trait.description: Inherited a naturally strong immune system, resisting illness and disease far better than most.

Trait.name: Frail Constitution
Trait.label: Frail Constitution
Trait.description: Inherited a naturally weak immune system, making illness and disease far more dangerous.

Trait.name: Genius
Trait.label: Genius
Trait.description: Born with exceptional inborn intellect that accelerates learning in almost any field.

Trait.name: Slow-Witted
Trait.label: Slow-Witted
Trait.description: Born with below-average intellect, making learning and complex reasoning more difficult.

Trait.name: Beautiful
Trait.label: Beautiful
Trait.description: Inherited striking good looks that are noticed and remembered by nearly everyone.

Trait.name: Homely
Trait.label: Homely
Trait.description: Inherited unremarkable or unattractive features that fail to make a strong impression.

Trait.name: Club Foot
Trait.label: Club Foot
Trait.description: Born with a twisted foot that causes a permanent limp and reduced mobility.

Trait.name: Longevity
Trait.label: Longevity
Trait.description: Inherited genes that slow the effects of aging, granting an unusually long lifespan.

Trait.name: Left-Handed
Trait.label: Left-Handed
Trait.description: Inherited a dominant left hand, a trait that runs in the family line.

Trait.name: Deformed Limb
Trait.label: Deformed Limb
Trait.description: Born with a misshapen limb inherited from a family lineage of similar deformities.
